message:
feat(conformance): add ext4 MMP block fixture, achieve 100% coverage

Adds conformance fixture for ext4 multi-mount protection (MMP) blocks,
completing conformance coverage for all identified on-disk structures.

- Add ext4_mmp_block.json fixture with clean state, nodename, bdevname
- Add validate_mmp_block_fixture() helper to ffs-harness
- Export Ext4MmpBlock and Ext4MmpStatus from ffs-ondisk
- Add conformance test verifying magic, seq, time, status decoding
- Update COVERAGE.md: ext4 and btrfs both at 100%

Overall conformance coverage: 128/128 MUST clauses (100.0%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@
 | Ext4Xattr (block) | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | user + security attrs |
 | Ext4DxRoot | ✅ | ✅ | 3 | 3 | 100% | htree DX root with 3 entries |
 | Ext4DxEntry | ✅ | ✅ | 2 | 2 | 100% | via dx_root fixture |
-| Ext4MmpBlock | ❌ | ❌ | 2 | 0 | 0% | **MISSING** - multi-mount protection |
+| Ext4MmpBlock | ✅ | ✅ | 2 | 2 | 100% | clean state, status decoding |
 
-**ext4 Total: 66 MUST clauses, 64 passing = 97.0%**
+**ext4 Total: 66 MUST clauses, 66 passing = 100.0%**
 
 ## btrfs On-Disk Structures
 
@@ -43,11 +43,13 @@
 
 ## Priority Gaps
 
-1. **ext4 MMP Block** - Multi-mount protection (2 MUST clauses)
+None. All identified on-disk structures have conformance fixtures.
 
 ## Next Actions
 
-- [ ] Add ext4_mmp_block.json fixture
+- [x] Add ext4_mmp_block.json fixture - DONE
+- [ ] Consider additional edge cases (malformed structures, boundary conditions)
+- [ ] Add more adversarial corpus entries for fuzzing
 
 ---

@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ b040217daafc0d5a7706a9263652b33776989f5b7c5c7f76e807a243860f6218  ext4_inode_inl
 218017aff301c4122502cc4dcc92d5f28242c3a5b771c52504a37569cb0fc4f1  ext4_extent_tree_leaf.json
 901129e2decfe6c7ddd2cb62654ba18cbd27aef49e06489362a740e06bfbd2cc  ext4_extent_tree_index.json
 ecf79fec1dda4871a142338f7ba1434883a6f8d138faaceadec9b786a48dce13  ext4_htree_dx_root.json
+ada91f6171cab575d4341dcb3894aa6033d490b4ab3f77c110bea8d76275ff38  ext4_mmp_block.json
 110c5e6ce902431ef5de6ab1251dbdf64856d9f332ac2c0a2e9422bfdb788459  ext4_superblock_mkfs_4096.json
 f6cd6207cd85daa625ac586bdf88b5b4a53084643c259d510e75c33c03de80b8  ext4_superblock_sparse.json
 ff88e6ea23e5969b13d7b99cbcc81cfbd20ac2f37a09555ab64c10a4b2111a98  ext4_xattr_block.json

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+{
+  "description": "ext4 MMP (multi-mount protection) block in clean state",
+  "size": 1024,
+  "writes": [
+    {"offset":   0, "hex": "504d4d00", "_comment": "magic = 0x004D4D50 (MMP_MAGIC) little-endian"},
+    {"offset":   4, "hex": "504d4dff", "_comment": "seq = 0xFF4D4D50 (MMP_SEQ_CLEAN) little-endian"},
+    {"offset":   8, "hex": "00f1536500000000", "_comment": "time = 1700000000 (timestamp)"},
+    {"offset":  16, "hex": "6666732d6e6f64652d3031", "_comment": "nodename = 'ffs-node-01' (64 bytes, null-padded)"},
+    {"offset":  80, "hex": "2f6465762f6e766d65306e31", "_comment": "bdevname = '/dev/nvme0n1' (32 bytes, null-padded)"},
+    {"offset": 112, "hex": "0500", "_comment": "check_interval = 5 seconds"},
+    {"offset": 1020, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "checksum placeholder (will be computed)"}
+  ]
+}

@@ -22,11 +22,11 @@ pub use ext4::{
     DirBlockIter, EXT_INIT_MAX_LEN, EXT4_ERROR_FS, EXT4_ORPHAN_FS, EXT4_VALID_FS,
     Ext4CompatFeatures, Ext4DirEntry, Ext4DirEntryRef, Ext4DirEntryTail, Ext4DxEntry, Ext4DxRoot,
     Ext4Extent, Ext4ExtentHeader, Ext4ExtentIndex, Ext4FileType, Ext4GroupDesc, Ext4ImageReader,
-    Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4RoCompatFeatures, Ext4Superblock, Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree,
-    FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, ext4_chksum, iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block,
-    lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block, parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree,
-    parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree, parse_xattr_block, stamp_block_bitmap_checksum,
-    stamp_dir_block_checksum, stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum,
-    verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum, verify_group_desc_checksum,
-    verify_inode_checksum,
+    Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4MmpBlock, Ext4MmpStatus, Ext4RoCompatFeatures,
+    Ext4Superblock, Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree, FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, ext4_chksum,
+    iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block,
+    parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree, parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree, parse_xattr_block,
+    stamp_block_bitmap_checksum, stamp_dir_block_checksum, stamp_extent_block_checksum,
+    stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum, verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum,
+    verify_group_desc_checksum, verify_inode_checksum,
 };
